t1_no: Extract the main T1/IRB/MRN document number from the upper-right header. Labels: 'IRB NO' / 'MRN' / 'No'. Example: '2561010000001108'. Keep exact formatting and add to t1_no.
t1_date: Extract the document issue date from the header area. Labels: 'Duzenlenme Tarihi' / 'Tarih' / 'Date'. Format usually includes time (e.g., '26.03.2025 15:44:35'). DO NOT confuse with export_declaration_date (a separate reference if shown). Keep the original format and add to t1_date.
export_declaration_no: Extract the export declaration reference number. Labels: 'Referans Numaralari (7)' / 'Ihracat Beyannameleri' / 'Export declaration number'. Example: '25610100EX00001697'. Add to export_declaration_no.
export_declaration_date: If an export declaration date is present alongside the export declaration number, copy it as-is. If absent, leave empty. Add to export_declaration_date.
invoice_no: If invoice numbers are listed in the documents section. Labels: 'INVOICE NO' / 'Invoice'. If multiple, join with '; '. If absent, leave empty. Add to invoice_no.
invoice_date: If invoice dates are present near invoice numbers, extract them. If multiple, join with '; '. If absent, leave empty. Add to invoice_date.
country_of_origin: Extract the origin/shipping country from box (15). Labels: 'Sevk/Ihracat Ulkesi' / 'Country of origin'. Example: 'TURKIYE'. Add to country_of_origin.
exporter: Extract the exporter name and address from box (2). Labels: 'Gonderici/Ihracatci' / 'Consignor'. Add to exporter.
importer: Extract the consignee name and address from box (8). Labels: 'Alici' / 'Consignee'. Add to importer.
buyer: If a separate buyer is listed (distinct from importer), extract it. Otherwise leave empty (do not duplicate from importer). Add to buyer.
seller: If a separate seller is listed (distinct from exporter), extract it. Otherwise leave empty (do not duplicate from exporter). Add to seller.
destination: Extract the destination country from box (17). Labels: 'Varis Ulkesi' / 'Destination'. Example: 'RUSYA FEDERASYONU'. Add to destination.
container_no: Extract container number from box (31.3). Labels: 'Konteyner No' / 'Container No'. Format: 4 letters + 7 digits. If shipment is by truck, the box may be empty — leave container_no empty in that case. DO NOT confuse with truck plate numbers shown elsewhere on the form. Add to container_no.
packages: Extract total package count and type by combining box (6) 'Toplam kap adedi' (count) with box (31.1, 31.2) 'Kaplarin marka ve numaralari' / 'Kaplarin Adet ve Cinsi' (marks and kind). Example: '738 / 738-BI'. Keep number and type in one line and add to packages.
net_weight: Extract total net weight from box (38). Labels: 'Net Agirlik (kg)' / 'Net weight'. Example: '19388,75'. Keep format and unit as shown. Add to net_weight.
gross_weight: Extract total gross weight from box (35). Labels: 'Brut Agirlik (kg)' / 'Gross weight'. Example: '21088,35'. Keep format and unit as shown. Add to gross_weight.
veterinary_certificate_no: Extract the veterinary certificate number from box (44). Labels: 'Ek Bilgi/Sunulan Belgeler/Sertifika ve Izinleri'. The entry typically reads 'Veteriner saglik sertifikasi - <number>' (e.g., '6101007342'). DO NOT confuse with TPS document references in the same box. Add to veterinary_certificate_no.
HS_code: Extract HS/tariff code from box (33). Labels: 'Esya Kodu' / 'HS code'. Format: typically 10 digits without separators (e.g., '030314200000'). If multiple line items have different codes, join with '; '. Add to HS_code.
products: Create product_1, product_2, ... from the item list 'Kalem Listesi' or goods table. Keep order from the document.
products[*].name_product: Extract the goods description from box (31.4). Labels: 'Esyanin Tanimi' / 'Description of goods'. Example: 'DONDURULMUS GOKKUSAGI ALABALIGI (ONCORHYNCHUS MYKISS)'. Add to products[i].name_product.
products[*].latin_name: If a Latin species name appears in the goods description (typically in parentheses), extract it. If absent, leave empty. Add to products[i].latin_name.
products[*].size_product: Extract size/grade if shown in the goods description (e.g., '0.8-1.2 KG'). Often absent in T1 forms — if not shown, leave empty. Add to products[i].size_product.
products[*].unit_box: Extract unit of measure if explicitly shown (e.g., 'KG', 'BOX'). Often absent in T1 forms — if not shown, leave empty. Add to products[i].unit_box.
products[*].packages: Extract package count/type for the line item from boxes (31.1) and (31.2). Example: '738-BI'. Add to products[i].packages.
products[*].net_weight: Extract net weight per line item from box (38). Add to products[i].net_weight.
products[*].gross_weight: Extract gross weight per line item from box (35). Add to products[i].gross_weight.
products[*].HS_code: Extract HS/tariff code per line item from box (33). Format: typically 10 digits without separators. Add to products[i].HS_code.
